error_signature: Code node only collects first input item
title: Code node only processes the first input item
symptom: The Code node is set to run once for all inputs but only returns the first item. The length of _items is 1 instead of the expected number of inputs.
applies_when: Set to run once for all inputs
not_this_if: Code node is directly connected to a node that outputs multiple items
root_cause: In n8n V2, the behavior of the Code node has changed. When set to run once for all inputs, it only processes the first item if there are intermediate nodes that collapse the input stream to a single item.
fix_steps: Add a Merge node before any node that reduces the stream to one item.
Ensure the Code node is directly connected to the node that outputs multiple items.
agent_instruction: Add a Merge node to ensure all items are passed to the Code node.
